implementation_summary: Added two optional props (adminPubkeys, ownPubkeyHex) to LeaveGroupButtonProps. Extracted isSoleAdmin as a pure exported helper. When isSoleAdmin is true, the Leave button opens a blocked-explanation modal showing copy.groups.lastAdminLeaveBlocked with a close-only action; the confirm-leave button is absent in this state. When isSoleAdmin is false, the normal confirmation modal with the leaveGroup action is shown unchanged. UX choice: keep the Leave button enabled in both states so the feature is discoverable and the explanation is presented inline in the modal rather than silently disabling the trigger.
